title: justicia ceylanica
intro: Justicia ceylanica, also known as the Ceylonese water willow or Kalabar, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Justicia ceylanica include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in the management of diabetes, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Justicia ceylanica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the plant's bioactive compounds using solvents like ethanol or glycerin.
